note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right cervical wound site, rates 9/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Abscess abscess Right cervical measures 2.0 cm x 0.2 cm x 0.6 cm.
  Wound bed: 51% slough, 49% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: light. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Abscess abscess Right cervical — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Alginate dressing applied.

Pt seen for wound eval. Abscess Right cervical measures aprx 2.0 x 0.2cm, depth 0.6cm.
Min drainage serous. Heel wound also eval - L heel 1.2x0.1, 0.3cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Thu.
